actionUnits.condition: Level3.unity: Elevator (PrefabInstance fileID 15099978) has BoxCollider (id 1067963289, isTrigger=1) and MonoBehaviour AttachToElevator (id 1067963293; script guid 077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77) with player reference fileID 7425022. Simulate the Player entering Elevator's trigger to invoke OnTriggerEnter on AttachToElevator. Note: No UnityEvent m_Calls configured on this MonoBehaviour.

Simulate the Player (fileID 7425022) exiting the Elevator's trigger to invoke OnTriggerExit on AttachToElevator (id 1067963293; script guid 077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77). Note: The BoxCollider (id 1067963289) is set as trigger; Elevator has no Rigidbody; assumes the other collider (Player) provides required physics component.
